query: SELECT subject, code, title, status, notes, last_covered_source, FROM_UNIXTIME(last_covered_at/1000) AS covered FROM curriculumTopics WHERE last_covered_source = 'mom_katy_voice_memo_2026-05-17' ORDER BY subject, ord;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT subject, code, title, status, notes, last_covered_source, FROM_UNIXTIME(last_covered_at/1000) AS covered FROM curriculumTopics WHERE last_covered_source = 'mom_katy_voice_memo_2026-05-17' ORDER BY subject, ord;
